description: Native Gmail MCP server: search, labels, archive, trash, attachments, and snooze.
name: io.github.csitte/mailwarden

environmentVariables.description: Config directory (default ~/.mailwarden), holds credentials.json and token.json
environmentVariables.name: MAILWARDEN_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Path to the Google OAuth credentials.json (Desktop app client)
environmentVariables.name: MAILWARDEN_CREDENTIALS

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to sweep due snoozes at startup and hourly while running
environmentVariables.name: MAILWARDEN_AUTO_SWEEP

environmentVariables.description: Restrict download_attachment writes to this directory (recommended for HTTP hosting)
environmentVariables.name: MAILWARDEN_DOWNLOAD_DIR
